nasb.text: ‘Again, if a man consecrates to the Lord part of the fields of his own property, then your valuation shall be proportionate to the seed needed for it: a homer of barley seed at fifty shekels of silver.

esv.text: “If a man dedicates to the Lord part of the land that is his possession, then the valuation shall be in proportion to its seed. A homer of barley seed shall be valued at fifty shekels of silver.

cnv.text: “如果有人把自己產業的一部分，分別為聖獻給耶和華，你的估價要根據那地的撒種量：每撒大麥二十公斤，估價五百七十克銀子。

ccb.text: “如果有人把自己继承的部分土地献给耶和华，祭司就要按照土地的播种量来估价，撒二十公斤大麦种子的土地值五百五十克银子。
